narration: Out in the endless dark drifts a living world. Oceans, forests, air you could breathe. The first paradise humanity has ever seen beyond Earth. For a moment, I let you hope. But nothing here is sleeping. Every leaf, every light, is turning to face us. We are not the explorers. We are the discovered.

shots.prompt: The starship approaches a stunning blue-green alien world wrapped in swirling bioluminescent clouds that glow turquoise and pink, two moons behind it. Hopeful, breathtaking reveal.
Descending low over endless glowing bioluminescent jungles and luminous oceans, rivers of light winding through alien forests far below. Sweeping cinematic flythrough at golden dusk.
Among the alien flora: giant luminous flowers and crystalline plants pulse softly with inner light, spores drifting like fireflies. Magical, serene close exploration.
Slowly, thousands of glowing eyes open across the dark foliage in every direction, all turning to stare at the same point. Subtle, deeply unsettling shift from beauty to dread.
